TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bujar_Nishani, title = Bujar_Nishani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bujar_Nishani} }

S.FORM: = Bujar Nishani = Mntucing hngkawas 1966 idas 9 jiyax 29 ka Bujar Nishani ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Albania ta sayang o kiya ka Bujar Nishani, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 7 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Puyaar.Hwa-yiko.Nisani (Bujar Faik Nishani) (knkawas 1966 idas 9 ali 29-Ngayan tntingan we Mehmeti), knkawas 2012 idas 7 de prading mg congtong nArpaniya, ma, ado ka mgcongtong, ma, wada na lixun ka mincu-tang-yen, yiyen ma mgnecun-pucang. Nisani nii we, wada mangal 73 ckceka na 140. Pnyasan ma kndusan Nisani nii we mntuting Tras nArpaniya. Knkawas 1988, malix muuyas Kanpeto cyungsu-tase, ma, berah na knkawas na 1996 ma sbukuy na we, mnosa slluhe Mekwo sun-antong-niaw, Tokosas-co ma Karihuniya. Dungan we, knkawas 2004 malix muuyas Tilana-tase hwari-si. Cung-cu Dungus spatis : Peheyu congtong ka Aarbaniyia knkawas 2012 Knkawas 1991, mosa tuumal Aarbaniyia mincu-tang ka Nisani, bobo mrqeraq ka Kong-cang cuyi de, mosa waycyaw-kwanyen tgbaro ba kwohwang-pu, ma, bobo na de mosa waycyaw-pu seediq pqlahang nPeye. Knkawas 1996 kbberih meyah mgkwohwang-pu kwanyen. Knkawas 1997, wada ini baka meeyah mingcu-tang, wada uka qpahun na di, kika mosa qmeepah Oco-Tasiyang cyunsu-cusi na hwe-congfu cucu. Knkawas 2001, wada mangal Tilana-fenpu congsuci, knkawas 2004, wada mangal Tilana yiwhe yiyen. Knkawas 2005, wada na ini baka ka ancen-pucang Tosuka mpheyu sotu tg34 psgeegan, kika heya ka dmudul ancen-yihwe weyenhwe. Knkawas 2007 idas 3, wada phyegun na congri Perisa ma, heya ka necung-pucang, bobo na mndaha mbeyax de, ma, heya ka psaun na ngayan suhwa-pucang. Knkawas 2011 de, heya ka smriyux Ruarcimu.Pasa musa mgnecung-pucang. Knkawas 2012 idas 6 ali 12, mangal pnhyegan cong-tong de, wada na lixan ka necung-pucang di. Papak
S.PHON: = bu…üa…ĺ nisńßani = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka bu…üa…ĺ nisńßani ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan albania ta sajaŇč o kija ka bu…üa…ĺ nisńßani, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. pujaa…ĺ.ńßwa-jiko.nisani (bu…üa…ĺ *aik nisńßani) (knkawas **** idas * ali **-Ňčajan tntiŇčan w…ô m…ôńßm…ôti), knkawas **** idas * d…ô p…ĺadiŇč mg ¶oŇčtoŇč na…ĺpanija, ma, ado ka mg ¶oŇčtoŇč, ma, wada na lixun ka min ¶u-taŇč-j…ôn, jij…ôn ma mgn…ô ¶un-pu ¶aŇč. nisani nii w…ô, wada maŇčal ** ¶k ¶…ôka na ***. pnjasan ma kndusan nisani nii w…ô mntutiŇč t…ĺas na…ĺpanija. knkawas ****, malix muujas kanp…ôto ¶juŇčsu-tas…ô, ma, b…ô…ĺańß na knkawas na **** ma sbukuj na w…ô, mnosa slluńß…ô m…ôkwo sun-antoŇč-niaw, tokosas- ¶o ma ka…ĺińßunija. duŇčan w…ô, knkawas **** malix muujas tilana-tas…ô ńßwa…ĺi-si. ¶uŇč- ¶u duŇčus spatis : p…ôńß…ôu ¶oŇčtoŇč ka aa…ĺbanijia knkawas **** knkawas ****, mosa tuumal aa…ĺbanijia min ¶u-taŇč ka nisani, bobo m…ĺq…ô…ĺaq ka koŇč- ¶aŇč ¶uji d…ô, mosa waj ¶jaw-kwanj…ôn tgba…ĺo ba kwońßwaŇč-pu, ma, bobo na d…ô mosa waj ¶jaw-pu s…ô…ôdiq pqlańßaŇč np…ô…ô. knkawas **** kbb…ô…ĺińß m…ôańß mgkwońßwaŇč-pu kwanj…ôn. knkawas ****, wada ini baka m…ô…ôańß miŇč ¶u-taŇč, wada uka qpańßun na di, kika mosa qm…ô…ôpańß o ¶o-tasijaŇč ¶junsu- ¶usi na ńßw…ô- ¶oŇč*u ¶u ¶u. knkawas ****, wada maŇčal tilana-*…ônpu ¶oŇčsu ¶i, knkawas ****, wada maŇčal tilana jiwńß…ô jij…ôn. knkawas ****, wada na ini baka ka an ¶…ôn-pu ¶aŇč tosuka mpńß…ôu sotu tg** psg…ô…ôgan, kika ńß…ôa ka dmudul an ¶…ôn-jińßw…ô w…ô…ônńßw…ô. knkawas **** idas *, wada pńßj…ôgun na ¶oŇč…ĺi p…ô…ĺisa ma, ńß…ôa ka n…ô ¶uŇč-pu ¶aŇč, bobo na mndańßa mb…ôax d…ô, ma, ńß…ôa ka psaun na Ňčajan suńßwa-pu ¶aŇč. knkawas **** d…ô, ńß…ôa ka sm…ĺijux …ĺua…ĺ ¶imu.pasa musa mgn…ô ¶uŇč-pu ¶aŇč. knkawas **** idas * ali **, maŇčal pnńßj…ôgan ¶oŇč-toŇč d…ô, wada na lixan ka n…ô ¶uŇč-pu ¶aŇč di. papak
S.FORM: = Bujar Nishani = Mntucing hngkawas 1966 idas 9 jiyax 29 ka Bujar Nishani ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Albania ta sayang o kiya ka Bujar Nishani, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 7 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Puyaar.Hwa-yiko.Nisani (Bujar Faik Nishani) (knkawas 1966 idas 9 ali 29-Ngayan tntingan we Mehmeti), knkawas 2012 idas 7 de prading mg congtong nArpaniya, ma, ado ka mgcongtong, ma, wada na lixun ka mincu-tang-yen, yiyen ma mgnecun-pucang. Nisani nii we, wada mangal 73 ckceka na 140. Pnyasan ma kndusan Nisani nii we mntuting Tras nArpaniya. Knkawas 1988, malix muuyas Kanpeto cyungsu-tase, ma, berah na knkawas na 1996 ma sbukuy na we, mnosa slluhe Mekwo sun-antong-niaw, Tokosas-co ma Karihuniya. Dungan we, knkawas 2004 malix muuyas Tilana-tase hwari-si. Cung-cu Dungus spatis : Peheyu congtong ka Aarbaniyia knkawas 2012 Knkawas 1991, mosa tuumal Aarbaniyia mincu-tang ka Nisani, bobo mrqeraq ka Kong-cang cuyi de, mosa waycyaw-kwanyen tgbaro ba kwohwang-pu, ma, bobo na de mosa waycyaw-pu seediq pqlahang nPeye. Knkawas 1996 kbberih meyah mgkwohwang-pu kwanyen. Knkawas 1997, wada ini baka meeyah mingcu-tang, wada uka qpahun na di, kika mosa qmeepah Oco-Tasiyang cyunsu-cusi na hwe-congfu cucu. Knkawas 2001, wada mangal Tilana-fenpu congsuci, knkawas 2004, wada mangal Tilana yiwhe yiyen. Knkawas 2005, wada na ini baka ka ancen-pucang Tosuka mpheyu sotu tg34 psgeegan, kika heya ka dmudul ancen-yihwe weyenhwe. Knkawas 2007 idas 3, wada phyegun na congri Perisa ma, heya ka necung-pucang, bobo na mndaha mbeyax de, ma, heya ka psaun na ngayan suhwa-pucang. Knkawas 2011 de, heya ka smriyux Ruarcimu.Pasa musa mgnecung-pucang. Knkawas 2012 idas 6 ali 12, mangal pnhyegan cong-tong de, wada na lixan ka necung-pucang di. Papak
